blockingIssues.description: replyMessage dedupe replay returns non-reply records as replies when a shared dedupe key was previously used by a root send, breaking causal linkage metadata (VAL-THREAD-001). In src/message.ts around line 498, replay by dedupe_key does not verify the existing row is a compatible reply, then fabricates in_reply_to via existing.in_reply_to ?? parentMessageId. Fix: validate that the replayed row's thread_id and in_reply_to match the intended reply context, or reject the replay with an error if the dedupe key was used for a different message type.

Watch emits historical message_created/reply_created events for pre-existing messages when those messages are updated (e.g., acked) after subscription starts, violating deterministic startup semantics (VAL-WATCH-003). In src/watch.ts around line 230, classifyEvents always emits a create event the first time a row is seen, regardless of whether it existed before watch start. Fix: record or query message creation timestamps at subscription start and suppress create events for messages that existed before the subscription began.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Dedupe replay in src/message.ts:161 uses check-then-insert without handling unique-constraint conflicts on concurrent insert, which could cause SQLITE_CONSTRAINT errors instead of returning the canonical existing message under contention.

Concurrent reply tests in test/thread.test.ts:273 execute replies sequentially rather than with parallel/process-level contention, leaving a coverage gap for true concurrency behavior (VAL-THREAD-003).

Integration concurrency tests in test/integration.test.ts:1057 are sequential on a single DB handle rather than exercising true overlapping execution, so they validate multi-operation consistency but not race conditions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: 'Workers must accurately report skillFeedback.followedProcedure in handoffs. If strict red/green TDD was not followed (e.g., implementation written before first failing test run), set followedProcedure to false and document deviations. Inaccurate compliance signals undermine review trust.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three independent features (cli-send-inbox-read-ack-flows session ea440dfb, cli-watch-stream-reliability session 008ae1ec, integration-cross-flow-reliability-suite session 0c458585) all show transcript evidence of implementation-before-test ordering while handoff reports followedProcedure=true. This is a systemic pattern across multiple workers in this milestone.
